scope: Owner-family planning and coverage accounting for Dataverse solutioncomponent.componenttype.

officialSource.notes: Current official Microsoft Learn choice list for solutioncomponent.componenttype. The current page omits component type 80 App Module, so the repo supplements that one case from local observed exports.

classificationRules.owner: Standalone owner-level family worth explicit coverage accounting. It must appear in the coverage matrix and either be planned under B-007 or closed as an explicit boundary.
classificationRules.subordinate: Dependent companion or child type that rides with an owner family and is not backlog-tracked separately unless a future proof point demonstrates an independent source, live, or package surface.
classificationRules.internal-only: Lookup context, platform catalog, or bookkeeping surface that is intentionally not treated as a standalone authoring lane.
classificationRules.unknown: Unresolved classification kept explicit until evidence is strong enough to promote it to owner, subordinate, or internal-only.

localObservedOnlyComponentTypes.label: App Module
localObservedOnlyComponentTypes.notes: Commonly observed export component type omitted from the current official Learn choice list.
